1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality geometry by kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones (gjentaksintervall = 200) intersecting Drammen municipality

3.description: Fetch buildings intersecting 200-year flood zones in Drammen

4.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality

5.description: Join buildings with flood zones to confirm intersection

6.description: Calculate distance from each building to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending

2.sql: SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE scenario = '200' AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"Feature","geometry":{{geom_geojson}},"properties":{}}'), 25833));

1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality boundary to use as spatial filter

2.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

4.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality

6.description: Calculate distance from each building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending
